rules.name: Missing dependency
rules.suggestion: A dependency is missing. Run `npm install` or add the missing package.

rules.name: Version conflict
rules.suggestion: Dependency version conflict. Check package.json for incompatible version ranges.

rules.name: Native module link error
rules.pattern: undefined is not an object.*NativeModules|TurboModuleRegistry|Native module.*cannot be null
rules.suggestion: Native module not linked. Run `npx pod-install` (iOS) or rebuild native project.
